special_mechanics.name: Wall Adhesion & Cover System
special_mechanics.description: Kyle can press against walls to avoid incoming bullets, providing cover during gunfights

special_mechanics.name: Blind Fire
special_mechanics.description: Kyle can fire his weapon blindly behind himself while in cover or mid-action

special_mechanics.name: Climbing
special_mechanics.description: Kyle can climb around the environment as part of traversal

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Upgrade System
special_mechanics.description: Shotgun increases speed and power as game progresses, affecting combat mechanics

tier_notes: Tier 2: Qualitative data only. Available sources document gameplay mechanics and animation quality but lack specific numerical physics parameters. Nintendo Power review notes play control is slower than comparable titles (Prince of Persia, Out of This World, Flashback). Game uses rotoscoping with 1000+ frames for smooth character animation. No ROM addresses or hex values available.
